Lyrics.text:
O……………………..
O……………………..
Fihino, fihino, fihino mafy aho Jeso ô,
Fa malemy, malemy,
Mora vaky raha tsy an-tananao, Jeso.

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Fihino tahaka an’i Jaona
Ho eo an-tratranao, Jeso
Fihino, fihino
Fa raha eo an-tratranao aho dia ho tony

Raha sendra ho kivy
Ka mila hangatsiaka ny finoako
Hafanao re, ry Zoky
O, fihino eo an-tratranao, Jeso

Manonja, mahery sy sivana izao,
Tompo ô, ka tohano, fihino
Tsy ho latsaka
’Ty zandrinao, Jeso
